texto: When I was in the hospital they gave me apple juice every morning, even after I told them I didn't like it. I had to get even. One morning, I poured the apple juice into the specimen tube. The nurse held it up and said, 'It's a little cloudy.' I took the tube from her and said, 'Let me run it through again,' and drank it. The nurse fainted.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Alan King: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao.
